_schema.description: Three-set Venn diagram data. Seven regions covering all combinations of membership in sets A, B, C. Replace sets and regions with real content.

fields.sets[].id: string — single uppercase letter: A, B, or C
fields.sets[].label: string — set name (\n for two-line label)
fields.sets[].color: string — hex color for this set circle and label
fields.regions[].id: string — combination key: A, B, C, AB, AC, BC, or ABC
fields.regions[].title: string — name of this intersection shown in info panel
fields.regions[].desc: string — one or two sentence description of what this region means
fields.regions[].items: string[] — examples or members belonging to this region
fields.regions[].count: number — size of this region (shown in count mode)

_schema.replace: Swap sets[].label and regions[].title/desc/items/count with your real sets and their members. All seven region ids (A, B, C, AB, AC, BC, ABC) should be present even if some have empty items arrays — the Venn diagram draws all regions regardless.

regions.title: Domain Expertise only
regions.desc: Deep subject-matter knowledge without data or communication skills. Valuable but siloed.

regions.title: Data Literacy only
regions.desc: Strong with data and models but lacking domain context and communication skills.

regions.title: Communication Skills only
regions.desc: Excellent communicator and facilitator without domain or data grounding.

regions.title: Domain Expertise + Data Literacy
regions.desc: Understands both the field and the data — can audit model outputs and spot domain errors.

regions.title: Domain Expertise + Communication
regions.desc: Can translate complex domain knowledge for broad audiences but lacks data fluency.

regions.title: Data Literacy + Communication
regions.desc: Can explain data findings clearly but may miss domain-specific nuance or errors.

regions.title: AI Collaborator
regions.desc: Full triple intersection: domain knowledge, data fluency, and communication. Can direct, evaluate, and explain AI outputs across the entire pipeline.
